metadata.title: Gratis ord- & tegntæller online – Tæl, transformer og analyser
metadata.description: Gratis ord-, tegn-, sætnings- og afsnitstæller. Skift store bogstaver, fjern duplikater, sortér linjer. 8 målinger og 10 tekstværktøjer.

software.description: Free word and character counter with text formatting tools. Counts words, characters, sentences, paragraphs, unique words and reading time. Offers 10 tools: letter case conversion, removing spaces, empty lines, duplicates, and sorting.

Convert to sentence case or title case

howTo.name: Sådan bruger du ord- og tegntælleren
howTo.description: Analyser og formater tekst i tre trin:

steps.name: Indsæt tekst
steps.text: Indsæt eller skriv tekst. Værktøjet tæller straks ord, tegn, sætninger, afsnit og unikke ord.

steps.name: Tjek statistikken
steps.text: I venstre panel ser du 8 målinger: ord, tegn, sætninger, afsnit, unikke ord, ordlængde og læsetid.

steps.name: Kopiér resultatet
steps.text: Klik på Kopiér tekst. Brug Ryd for at starte forfra.

contentBlocks.title: Gratis ord- og tegntæller med tekstværktøjer
contentBlocks.html:
Dette værktøj kombinerer en ord- og tegntæller med tekstformateringsfunktioner. Indsæt tekst og se ord, tegn, sætninger, afsnit, unikke ord og læsetid.

Under tekstfeltet finder du 10 værktøjer: konvertering af store/små bogstaver, fjernelse af mellemrum, tomme linjer, duplikater og sortering. Alt behandles lokalt i din browser.

contentBlocks.title: Sådan bruger du ord- og tegntælleren
contentBlocks.description: Analyser og formater tekst i tre trin:

items.title: 1. Indsæt tekst
items.description: Indsæt eller skriv tekst. Værktøjet tæller straks ord, tegn, sætninger, afsnit og unikke ord.

items.title: 2. Tjek statistikken
items.description: I venstre panel ser du 8 målinger: ord, tegn, sætninger, afsnit, unikke ord, ordlængde og læsetid.

items.title: 3. Transformer tekst
items.description: Under tekstfeltet finder du 10 transformationsværktøjer.

items.title: 4. Kopiér resultatet
items.description: Klik på Kopiér tekst. Brug Ryd for at starte forfra.

contentBlocks.title: 8 tekstmålinger
contentBlocks.description: Tælleren analyserer din tekst med otte indikatorer:

items.title: Words
items.description: Total word count. The primary indicator of text length, useful for content creation, articles and descriptions.

items.title: Characters (with spaces)
items.description: All characters including spaces. Useful when a platform has a character limit (e.g., Amazon listings, meta descriptions).

items.title: Characters (without spaces)
items.description: Only letters, digits and punctuation. The standard billing unit for translations and print shops.

items.title: Sentences
items.description: Number of sentences in the text. Helps assess complexity and readability — shorter sentences are easier to absorb.

items.title: Paragraphs
items.description: Text blocks separated by blank lines. Well-structured paragraphs improve readability on screens.

items.title: Unique words
items.description: Number of non-repeating words. A higher ratio of unique to total words indicates richer vocabulary.

items.title: Average word length
items.description: Average number of characters per word. An indicator of text complexity — technical texts have longer words than casual ones.

items.title: Reading time
items.description: Estimated time to read the text at 200 words per minute. An approximate value for typical text.

contentBlocks.title: 10 tekstformateringsværktøjer
contentBlocks.description: Under tekstfeltet finder du knapper til hurtig transformation:

items.title: UPPERCASE
items.description: Converts all text to uppercase. Useful for headings, acronyms and highlighting text fragments.

items.title: lowercase
items.description: Converts all text to lowercase. Useful for normalizing text copied from different sources.

items.title: Sentence case
items.description: First letter of each sentence is capitalized, the rest lowercase. Standard format for continuous text.

items.title: Title Case
items.description: Each word starts with a capital letter. Ideal for titles, headings and proper names.

items.title: tOGGLE cASE
items.description: Swaps uppercase to lowercase and vice versa. Useful when text was typed with Caps Lock on.

items.title: Remove extra spaces
items.description: Reduces multiple spaces to one and trims spaces at the beginning and end of each line.

items.title: Remove empty lines
items.description: Removes empty and redundant lines from text. Useful for cleaning text copied from websites.

items.title: Remove duplicate lines
items.description: Keeps only unique lines, removing repetitions. Useful for cleaning lists and data.

items.title: Sort A→Z
items.description: Sorts text lines alphabetically in ascending order. Useful for organizing lists, keywords and data.

items.title: Sort Z→A
items.description: Sorts text lines alphabetically in descending order. Reverse sort order.

contentBlocks.title: Hvem er ordtælleren til?
contentBlocks.description: Værktøjet er nyttigt for alle, der arbejder med tekst:

items.title: Copywriters and editors
items.description: Count words and characters, check platform limits, quickly change letter case and clean text before publishing.

items.title: Bloggers and content creators
items.description: Monitor post length, check reading time, remove duplicate lines and sort lists.

items.title: Store owners
items.description: Verify product descriptions against character limits on platforms (Amazon, eBay, Etsy).

items.title: SEO specialists
items.description: Analyze content length, count unique words and assess text complexity based on average word length.

items.title: Students and academics
items.description: Check word or character limits in essays and research papers.

items.title: Translators
items.description: Count characters without spaces for quotes (the standard billing unit in translation).

items.title: 8 text metrics
items.description: Words, characters with and without spaces, sentences, paragraphs, unique words, average word length and reading time — all in one panel.

items.title: 10 formatting tools
items.description: Letter case conversion, removing spaces, empty lines, duplicates and sorting — without installing additional software.

items.title: Local processing in the browser
items.description: Your text is never sent to any server. All analysis and transformation happens locally on your device.

items.title: Copy and clear text
items.description: Copy the modified text to your clipboard with one click or clear the field to start over.

items.title: Instant results
items.description: Statistics update in real time as you type or paste text. No waiting for processing.

items.title: No registration or limits
items.description: The tool is completely free. No registration, login or personal data required.

contentBlocks.title: Ofte stillede spørgsmål om ord- og tegntælleren

items.question: Hvordan fungerer læsetidsberegningen?
items.answer: Værktøjet deler ordantallet med 200, den gennemsnitlige læsehastighed. Resultatet er en omtrentlig værdi.

items.question: Er min tekst sikker?
items.answer: Ja. Al analyse sker lokalt i din browser. Teksten sendes aldrig til en server.
items.answerSchemaText: Ja. Teksten behandles lokalt i browseren.

contentBlocks.title: Hjælp os med at forbedre vores værktøjer
contentBlocks.description: Har du en idé til en ny funktion, fundet en fejl eller vil foreslå et andet værktøj, der ville gøre dit arbejde lettere? Skriv til os – vi svarer inden for 24 timer.
